qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal AS ID, PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT FROM PER01_PERSONAL WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.d_email != \'\' AND ISNOTNULL(PER01_PERSONAL.d_email) AND PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal AS ID, PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT FROM PER01_PERSONAL WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.d_email != \'\' AND ISNOTNULL(PER01_PERSONAL.d_email) AND PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY_PERSONAL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Legajo.PERSONAL\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_personal as ID, t.c_personal as CODE, t.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PER01_PERSONAL as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Legajo.PERSONAL\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_personal LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.d_email != \'\' AND ( CONTAIN(UCASE(t.c_personal),UCASE({#SOURCE:DATA/@FILTER})) OR CONTAIN(UCASE(t.d_ape_y_nom),UCASE({#SOURCE:DATA/@FILTER})) ) ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW[CONTAINS(UPPER_CASE(@TEXT),UPPER_CASE(#SOURCE:DATA/@FILTER)) or CONTAINS(UPPER_CASE(@CODE),UPPER_CASE(#SOURCE:DATA/@FILTER))]
